title: koeleria setacea var. glabra
intro: Koeleria setacea var. glabra, also known as smooth June grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Koeleria setacea var. glabra include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. This plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis, and to aid in digestion, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. In herbal preparations, Koeleria setacea var. glabra is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
